fileMap: docs/GLOSSARY.md — create — new integrator-facing glossary of 9 core API/domain terms
README.md — modify — add one-line pointer to GLOSSARY.md in the Product Docs list
fixApproach: Create a new `docs/GLOSSARY.md` file with 9 integrator-facing term definitions (Provider, Provider ID, Voice, Dialect, Catalog, Capability, Job, SSML tag, Steering), each 1–3 sentences of descriptive prose. Cross-link Provider ID to `docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md` (forward-looking) and SSML tag to `docs/DISCOVERY.md#ssml-editor`. Then add a one-line pointer to the glossary in `README.md`'s Product Docs list. No code changes.
steps: Create `docs/GLOSSARY.md` with a title (`# Glossary`), a brief preamble, and 1–3 sentence definitions for each of the 9 terms: Provider, Provider ID, Voice, Dialect, Catalog, Capability, Job, SSML tag, Steering. Use cross-links: Provider ID → `PROVIDER_IDS.md`, SSML tag → `DISCOVERY.md#ssml-editor`.
Edit `README.md`: add `- Glossary: `docs/GLOSSARY.md`` to the Product Docs bullet list.
Run `npm run test` (and optionally `npm run build:web`) to confirm no breakage from the docs-only addition.
summary: Add `docs/GLOSSARY.md` with 9 core term definitions and link it from README.md
